mapper.select:
select * from course
and (course_name like concat('%', #{course_name}, '%') or course_code like concat('%', #{course_name}, '%'))
order by course_code asc
mapper.insert: insert into course(id, course_name, course_code, credit, description) values (#{id}, #{course_name}, #{course_code}, #{credit}, #{description})
mapper.select: select c.*, GROUP_CONCAT(ct.teacher_name SEPARATOR '、') as teacher_name from course c left join course_teacher ct on c.id = ct.course_id where c.id = #{id} group by c.id
